name: smit-ai-communication-assistant
description: AI-powered chatbot system for Saylani Mass IT Training (SMIT)

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && venv\\Scripts\\activate && uvicorn main:app --reload"
scripts.install-all: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend
scripts.install-backend: cd backend && venv\\Scripts\\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt

author: SMIT Development Team
